text:
— 
LONG NAME: POST_OOPT_COPAY_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2007. This field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost 
Shares do not apply. 
Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (POST_OOPT_COINS_AMT). The 
catastrophic coverage phase is also referred to as the
